attacks.finding: Evaluation pack excludes expected labels, scores, activation weights, confidence, and original validity fields.
Preserved because Mode C is a recorded Codex adversarial review, not a separately authenticated outside service.
Preserved because candidate mechanism labels are visible to all evaluators.
181 candidates survived two or more modes; inflation remains possible.
Mitigated by requiring mechanism necessity, observation support, interaction, and falsifier fields.
Preserved because Proof 043 does not regenerate candidates.
Preserved for deterministic modes and recorded Codex review.

invalidated_claims: The evaluation is fully external to Codex.
Mechanism label wording cannot explain any survival.
All surviving candidates are true composites rather than pathway inflation artifacts.
surviving_claims: A meaningful subset of stripped composite candidates survived two or more evaluator modes.
Original internal scores and expected labels are not needed for those surviving votes.
